text: Jure went shopping today and bought a burberry shirt in a thrift store.
Jure went to the gym and set a new personal best in pull-ups. He had amazing sex with his girlfriend. He went dancing at a milonga at Bar Zorica and met up with his friends there.
Jure and Dan Sebastjan cycled to Škofja Loka to visit Lenart. They ate excellent food at Pr’ Pepet and smoked several cigarettes.
Jure visited Viva after work. They had a long, gentle and rough sex session. Afterwards, they went out and danced at a milonga until 00:30. Jure drank a small amount of red wine.
